race.comment: WHOOPS A DAISY (12) finished just shy of the frame in fourth last start at Balaklava, an improvement on her tenth at Morphettville Parks the run before. Has the ability to find the winners' list. SWEET 'N' SPICY (10) finished third last start over 1100m at Bendigo, beaten 2 lengths. Ready to go a couple better. JUSTADEXTER (5) didn't threaten in town first-up when tackling tougher opposition but will find this easier with that run out of the way. Gets in well with the 3kg claim and can improve sharply. REFRESHING (6) backs up quickly and while she's been poor in her last two her best form measures up. Keeping safe for a minor spot.
